title: heterotheca echioides var. bolanderioides
intro: Heterotheca echioides var. bolanderioides, also known as Bolander's false goldenaster, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The Bolander's false goldenaster is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various ailments, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
